# env/requirements_dependent.txt
# Must be installed AFTER requirements.txt (needs torch already present).
# torch-scatter ships prebuilt wheels matched to the exact torch build; install from
# the PyG wheel index rather than PyPI, e.g. for torch 2.11.0 + CUDA 12.8:
#   pip install torch-scatter -f https://data.pyg.org/whl/torch-2.11.0+cu128.html
# torch stack
torch-scatter>=2.1.2
